title: Neutradol Carpet Deodoriser, Vac Scents, Odour Neutraliser Powder for Carpets & Rugs, Fresh Amber Glow, Multipack of 2 x 350g
features: Eliminates Odours at the Source: Scientifically designed to neutralise bad smells from pets, smoke, and everyday odours without simply masking them. Enjoy lasting freshness with every vacuum.
Fragrance Blend of Amber & Lily Fresh: Choose between the warm, comforting notes of Amber or the floral lift of Lily Fresh. Both fragrances infuse your space after every clean.
Sprinkle, Wait, Vacuum, Done!: Just sprinkle a light layer over your carpet or rug, leave for a few minutes, and vacuum as normal.
Home Friendly Formula: Gentle enough for homes with kids and pets, yet powerful enough to tackle everyday household odours.
Ideal for Carpets, Rugs & Pet Areas: Perfect for use in living rooms, bedrooms, hallways, and anywhere odours tend to linger. Great for refreshing pet bedding and high traffic areas.
description: From the brand Previous page Neutradol safely destroys bad odour molecules, leaving fresh, clean air. KITCHENS BATHROOMS OFFICES LIVING AREAS The Science of Freshness Destroys odours at the molecular level. Trusted by millions for over 30 years. Gentle and effective formula Breaks down even the toughest odour molecules Innovative solutions for every odour problem Neutradol is the original and most effective odour destroyer, not just masking smells but eliminating them with a powerful, science-led formula. With over 50 active ingredients, our hygienic and non-toxic products tackle even the toughest odours in homes, offices, and beyond. Backed by ongoing innovation, Neutradol offers targeted solutions for every kind of smell. Neutradol – Not magic. Just science. Next page
